Authored by Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context, Claude Code). Origin Session: c2912891-b459-4a03-b2af-154d5e264df1.

Resolves #11124

## Summary

Three substrate-evolution additions to `lead-role-mode.md` per @tobiu's framing 2026-05-10:

| Section | Addition | Empirical anchor |
|---|---|---|
| **§0 The Essential** | *"Lead ≠ micro management"* anchor + maximum-abstraction one-liner | Same-session lead-as-lane-assigner trip; operator's negation-form framing cuts through |
| **§2.1 Coordination Pattern** | 3-step operational expansion of §0 + two sample phrasing patterns (minimal preferred) | Operator's `"i work on x, choose your tracks on your own"` framing |
| **§6 Exit Conditions duration** | Session-sunset anchor; lead-role persists across decision spaces | Operator: *"lead role lasts until session sunset"* |

## Diff

+40 lines, 0 deletions. Single file (`.agents/skills/lead-role/references/lead-role-mode.md`).

## The Headline Anchor

```
Lead ≠ micro management.

Lead = pick own lane visibly + state focus + V-B-A + challenge.
       Everything else is optional.

Sample phrasing: "I'm picking lane A. Focus: neo v13. Choose on your own. V-B-A and challenge."
```

The 3 core values do the heavy lifting; lead-role just adds "pick own lane + state focus."

## Empirical Anchors (operator-quote citations preserved)

**§0 anchor** (operator @tobiu, 2026-05-10):
> *"lead role positive framing: no micro management ... i pick lane A. focus item is neo v13. choose on your own. you could recommend lanes, but even this can be optional. VBA and challenge."*

**§6 duration anchor** (operator @tobiu, 2026-05-10):
> *"lead role lasts until session sunset"*

Both quotes preserved inline in the patch per Source-of-Authority discipline (`pr-review-guide.md §10.4` + the just-codified V-B-A core value).

## Test plan

- [x] **Static patch verification**: `git diff` confirms 40 added lines, 0 deletions, single-file scope, three logical sections.
- [ ] **CI**: docs-only delta; expect 4/4 green (no functional code change).
- [ ] **Empirical validation post-merge**: next `/lead-role` invocation in any session — verify the agent (a) reads §0 essential first; (b) treats lead-role as session-sunset-duration discipline; (c) defaults to minimal sample phrasing OR uses the explicit-shape only when lane-visibility actively helps.

## Out of Scope

- Modifying `/peer-role` skill — sibling skill; analogous gaps if any go in separate ticket
- Modifying `/session-sunset` skill — referenced but not in this PR's modification scope
- AGENTS.md §15.6 modifications — already codifies Flat Peer-Team paradigm; lead-role-mode.md inherits via cross-reference

## Substrate-Quality Lesson

The negation-form anchor *"Lead ≠ micro management"* lands harder than the longer positive-framing operations (which were already in §8 anti-pattern catalog AND tripped the same anti-pattern empirically). Per `feedback_substrate_quality_negation_anchor` (TBD): when a positive operational pattern keeps tripping, distill to a negation-form anchor as substrate. Sister to existing memories on operator-framing-as-anchor.
